description: CompositionWhite polo T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed collar, a ruffled buttoned placket, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs and sleeve and a vented hemFitbasics Muscle FitWash careMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleachHang dry in shadeWarm iron do not iron on print or embroideryThe ruffled placket on the classic polo T-shirt adds a modern style to this tee from basics, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. Team it with jeans, tees and sneakers.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
